programs.title: The Real Housewives Of Durban
programs.desc: The ladies gear up for another getaway to the Drakensberg, but this time Jojo and Nonku land first. Sparks fly early when somebody mentions the word witchcraft and Slee confronts the ladies about their reaction to her incense.

programs.title: Lego Masters Australia
programs.desc: The teams need to create a bridge that can survive two shaking plates. If more than one bridge survives all 12 levels of shaking, the prettiest bridge wins.

programs.title: Cards And Collectables Australia
programs.desc: The force is strong with a Star Wars collector. A film lover whose turned his home into a movie museum. We visit a Trade Day to see what people are chasing and an NBA collector who chose SGA over Luka and is now reaping the rewards.

programs.title: Explore TV
programs.desc: Explore TV takes you around the world to places you'll never forget.

programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: When they get into a fight, Barbie volunteers to swap rooms with her sisters Skipper and Stacie. Eventually all of the Roberts sisters learn no roommate is perfect.

programs.title: Barney's World
programs.desc: Barney helps David and Vivie plan something nice for Mel after she breaks her arm; Mel is upset because there are certain things she cannot do with a cast, so Barney comes up with a game that helps Mel accept her abilities with help from a robot arm.
